name: TTEC Holdings, Inc.
business: TTEC is a global customer experience (CX) outsourcing partner that designs, builds, and operates technology-enabled customer experiences across live interaction channels and provides data-driven AI-enabled digital solutions. As of December 31, 2025, it served over 720 clients across targeted industry verticals. The company operates through two segments: TTEC Digital, which focuses on CX technology and service including CCaaS, CRM, and AI and Analytics, and TTEC Engage, which provides digital first AI-enabled CX operational and managed services.

exposures.sentence: TTEC Digital is one of the largest CX technology and service providers and is focused on the intersection of Contact Center as a Service ( CCaaS ), Customer Relationship Management ( CRM ), and AI and Analytics.
